name: Meet the Mascots: World Cup 2026 Opening Weekend
parameter: World Cup 2026 mascots and opening weekend
angle: News-driven daily quiz, pitched for casual fans. Funny/ironic spine: FIFA gave WC2026 three official animal mascots (Maple the moose, Zayu the jaguar, Clutch the bald eagle), but the breakout viral star has been Labubu, the wide-eyed plush toy POP MART signed as an official partner. Wrapped around accessible opening-weekend facts and the red-card-fest opener.

questions.question: Three countries are co-hosting the 2026 World Cup. Which three?
Which host nation won the opening match of the tournament, beating South Africa 2-0?
The 2026 World Cup has three official mascots. The USA's mascot, Clutch, is which animal?
Canada's official World Cup mascot, Maple, is which animal?
Mexico's official World Cup mascot is a jaguar. What is it called?
Despite the three official animal mascots, a wide-eyed plush toy became an unlikely viral star after FIFA made it an official 2026 World Cup partner. What is it called?
Who are the reigning world champions heading into 2026?
Which superstar captained Argentina to the 2022 World Cup title?
How many teams are at the 2026 World Cup, the most ever?
Which country has won the most World Cups, with five titles?
Where will the 2026 World Cup final be played, just outside New York?
Which Colombian pop superstar performed at the World Cup opening ceremony in Mexico City?
Which famous Mexico City stadium hosted the opening match and ceremony?
Which legend is the only player to win the World Cup three times?
The bad-tempered opener between Mexico and South Africa saw the referee hand out three of what?

sources: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maple,_Zayu_and_Clutch (official WC2026 mascots: Maple the moose for Canada, Zayu the jaguar for Mexico, Clutch the bald eagle for the USA)
https://www.hola.com/us/lifestyle/20260611906886/labubu-fifa-world-cup-2026-mascot/ (POP MART's Labubu partnered with FIFA for WC2026; featured in the official FIFA Sound video 'Goals')
https://www.sbs.com.au/news/article/fifa-world-cup-2026-results-june-12/ogazcegwe (Mexico v South Africa opener: three red cards issued; Quinones and Jimenez scored)
https://www.today.com/news/sports/live-blog/world-cup-2026-opening-ceremony-mexico-shakira-live-updates-rcna347915 (opening ceremony at Estadio Azteca, Mexico City; Shakira performed)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup (48 teams; hosts USA/Canada/Mexico; final at MetLife Stadium, New Jersey)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pele (only player to win three World Cups)
